hero.description: Leave ordinary patterns behind. Surgical art designed strictly according to your unique facial anatomy under the leadership of Op. Dr. Sefa Keşan.

biography.title: Naturalness and Functionality in Aesthetics
biography.desc: Every face tells a unique story. My philosophy is to find the face's own golden ratio boundaries and blend symmetry with functionality. You can review my academic journey spanning from Cerrahpaşa Faculty of Medicine and my achievements in detail.

yag-enjeksiyonu.subtitle: Autologous Tissue Transfer
yag-enjeksiyonu.desc: Creating a natural and permanent youth effect by transferring fat tissue taken from specific body areas to regions with volume loss.

bisektomi.subtitle: Facial Slimming

rinoplasti.title: Primary Rhinoplasty Surgery
rinoplasti.details: The nasal bridge structure has been adjusted in harmony with facial proportions, and the droopy nasal tip has been lifted according to the golden ratio.

revizyon-rinoplasti.title: Revision Rhinoplasty
revizyon-rinoplasti.details: Reconstruction was performed using rib cartilage grafts in a patient who had previous surgery and suffered from cartilage collapse.

otoplasti.title: Otoplasty (Ear Aesthetics)
otoplasti.details: The prominent ear angle was corrected with an incision made from behind the ear, ensuring natural curvature and symmetry.

yag-enjeksiyonu.title: Fat Injection (Autologous Transfer)
yag-enjeksiyonu.details: Long-term volume, lifting, and rejuvenating effect provided by injecting the patient's own fat tissue into cheekbones and jawline.

bisektomi.title: Bichectomy (Cheek Aesthetics)
bisektomi.details: By controlled removal of fat pads in the cheek area, cheekbones were highlighted and a sharper facial contour was achieved.

biographyPage.heroText: Aesthetic surgery is not just an anatomical change; it is a journey of re-discovering an individual's own self-confidence, expression, and the hidden elegance in their face within the most natural golden ratio boundaries.
biographyPage.about1Part1: Op. Dr. Sefa Keşan crowned his passion for medical education at one of Turkey's most established institutions,
biographyPage.about1Strong: Istanbul University Cerrahpaşa Faculty of Medicine
biographyPage.about1Part2: . After completing his medical education with high honors, he pursued his interest in aesthetic and reconstructive surgery and began his residency in Plastic, Reconstructive, and Aesthetic Surgery with high success in the specialty exam.
biographyPage.about2: During his residency, he focused on rhinoplasty and holistic facial anatomy. To closely follow international developments, he served as a visiting surgeon in reputable clinics in Europe and America. He carried out innovative studies, especially on rib cartilage micro-grafting techniques in revision rhinoplasty.
biographyPage.about3: Today, he continues to provide premium health services with a 'personalized golden ratio design' approach to patients from all over the world at his own private luxury clinic in Nişantaşı, Istanbul.
memberships: TPRECD (Turkish Society of Plastic, Reconstructive and Aesthetic Surgery)
ISAPS (International Society of Aesthetic Plastic Surgery)
EAFPS (European Academy of Facial Plastic Surgery)

timelineCards.title: Medical School Graduation
timelineCards.desc: Graduation from Cerrahpaşa Faculty of Medicine with high honors.

timelineCards.title: Residency & Excellence
timelineCards.desc: Title of Plastic, Reconstructive and Aesthetic Surgery Specialist and Young Surgeon of the Year presentation award.

timelineCards.title: EBOPRAS European Qualification
timelineCards.desc: Achieving international accreditation by receiving the European Board of Plastic, Reconstructive and Aesthetic Surgery (EBOPRAS) certification.

timelineCards.title: Nişantaşı Premium Clinic
timelineCards.desc: Establishment of a modern boutique clinic in accordance with international health tourism standards.

biographyPage.appointmentText: You can contact us immediately to design the most suitable surgical or medical planning for your facial structure with Op. Dr. Sefa Keşan, accompanied by digital simulation.

footer.subtitle: Aesthetic and Plastic Surgery
footer.quote: True beauty does not lie in a foreign touch to the face; it lies in the expression re-discovering its own hidden elegance and flawless balance.
footer.description: At our Nişantaşı clinic, we improve your quality of life with operation processes planned entirely for you and your bone anatomy, adhering to international health standards.
footer.socialText: You can follow our current cases and surgical processes from our social media accounts.
footer.legal: In accordance with T.R. Ministry of Health regulations, the information on this site is for informational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice.

rinoplasti.title: Rhinoplasty (Nose Surgery)
rinoplasti.subtitle: Synchronization of Aesthetics and Breathing Function
rinoplasti.content: Rhinoplasty surgery does not only change external appearance, but also optimizes the breathing function that directly affects your quality of life. Before each operation, the person's facial structure, chin angle, and forehead distance are analyzed to determine the anatomy that will look most natural.

symptoms.label: Nasal Hump
symptoms.path: Using Ultrasonic Piezo surgery, bone tissue is filed millimetrically without breaking, preserving the natural profile line.

symptoms.label: Nasal Deviation
symptoms.path: Axis deviation is brought to the midline with functional septoplasty techniques; symmetry and breathing channels are optimized.

symptoms.label: Droopy Nasal Tip
symptoms.path: Cartilage support mechanisms are strengthened, raising the lip-nose angle to the ideal 95-105 degree scale.

revizyon-rinoplasti.title: Revision Rhinoplasty
revizyon-rinoplasti.subtitle: More Challenging Cases, Flawless Experience
revizyon-rinoplasti.content: A correction operation performed for patients who have had a previous operation but could not achieve the desired aesthetic or functional result.

otoplasti.title: Otoplasty (Ear Aesthetics)
otoplasti.subtitle: Symmetry and Self-Confidence in Facial Features
otoplasti.content: The process of bringing the angle the ears make with the skull base to normal.

symptoms.label: Prominent Ear Angle
symptoms.path: Corrected with permanent sutures from behind the ear.

yag-enjeksiyonu.title: Fat Injection
yag-enjeksiyonu.subtitle: Autologous Tissue Transfer
yag-enjeksiyonu.content: The process of injecting fat tissues taken from the person's own body into areas of the face experiencing volume loss. Since it is your own tissue, it fully adapts to the body and offers natural results.

symptoms.label: Volume Loss
symptoms.path: Fat transfer is performed to needed areas to strengthen tissue support and reshape facial features.

bisektomi.title: Bichectomy
bisektomi.subtitle: Facial Slimming
bisektomi.content: Procedure of removing fat pads inside the cheeks to make the face slimmer and features more defined.

symptoms.label: Cheek Fullness
symptoms.path: Fat pads inside the cheeks are reduced to create sharper features.
